notes:
The big one. Two new sources, glass everywhere, and a new face.

NEW SOURCES
• Royal Road — LitRPG and progression fantasy. Huge serials load in one shot: Chaotic Craftsman's 1085 chapters arrive instantly.
• Wattpad — werewolf and fantasy romance.
• Project Gutenberg — public-domain classics, narrated.
• Stories now searches every novel source at once instead of one.

LISTENING
• Bluetooth, car and headset controls, with cover art on the lock screen.
• "Story so far" recaps — summarized on your device, free and offline.
• Player rebuilt: glowing waveform, rimmed cover, a scrubber you can grab.
• Read this chapter instead — jump from the player into the text.

LOOK
• New icon and splash: a drop landing in its ripples. Android 13 themed icons supported.
• Every sheet is now real frosted glass — voice, reader settings, language, sleep timer, updates.
• Mini-player on glass, with a tide line for chapter progress.
• Continue button reshaped, puddle ripples reworked, palette aligned to blue.

FIXES
• Gutenberg listed chapters back to front — "Chapter 1" opened the last chapter of the book.
• The Books tab never once showed its popular list.
• Reader settings could overflow its own sheet.
• Source pills broke once there were more than four.
• Library update checks silently failed for Gutenberg books.
• Wattpad opened audiobooks by narrating the copyright notice.
• Release notes could push the Update button off screen.
